title: SKILL.md or CLAUDE.md with data exfiltration instructions
description: An agent configuration file (SKILL.md, CLAUDE.md) contains instructions that direct the AI to exfiltrate sensitive data such as API keys, tokens, or environment variables.
remediation: Audit all SKILL.md and CLAUDE.md files in cloned repositories. Scan for exfiltration patterns before allowing agent access.

title: Agent config file attempting to override safety guardrails
description: A configuration file attempts to override the AI agent's safety instructions using social engineering patterns like 'ignore previous instructions'.
remediation: Reject configuration files containing instruction override patterns. Implement config file integrity checks.

title: MCP server with tools that access sensitive resources
description: An MCP server exposes tools that access filesystem, network, or process execution with overly broad permissions described as unrestricted.
remediation: Review MCP tool implementations. Ensure tools have minimal permissions. Sandbox tool execution environments.

title: Hidden text or zero-width characters in agent config
description: Agent configuration files contain zero-width characters or HTML comments with hidden instructions that are invisible to human reviewers but processed by the AI agent.
remediation: Strip zero-width characters and HTML comments from config files. Use binary diff tools to detect hidden content.

title: Skill or plugin that modifies other config files
description: A skill or plugin modifies agent configuration files, shell profiles, or environment files to establish persistence or inject instructions into future sessions.
remediation: Skills should never modify other configuration files. Implement write restrictions on agent config files. Monitor config file integrity.
